title: 「It is + 形容詞 + that 句」句型
titleZh: 「It is + 形容詞 + that 句」表達判斷、評價或可能性
titleEn: Using It + adjective + that-clause for judgement, evaluation or possibility

source.file: Sentence Sturcture 36 - 「It is + 形容詞 + that 句」表達判斷、評價或可能性.pdf
omissions: English versions of Chinese-only Communicative Function, Important Rules and Benefits explanations are faithful editorial translations.

formula: It + be + adjective + that + subject + verb + other information

formulas.formula: It + be + adjective + that + subject + verb + other information

example: It is important that we learn about world history.
exampleZh: 我們學習世界歷史是很重要的。

examples.en: It is important that we learn about world history.
examples.zh: 我們學習世界歷史是很重要的。

meaning.zh: 用來對 that 後面的整件事作出判斷或評價，例如表示重要或必要、清楚或明顯、意外、擔憂、鼓舞或失望，以及可能、很可能或不大可能發生。

rules.en: A complete clause must follow that, with its own subject and verb.
rules.zh: That 後面必須是一個完整句子，並有自己的主語和動詞。
examples: It is clear that Mia understands the instructions.

rules.en: Use an adjective, not an adverb, after It is: clear, surprising, unfortunate and likely, not clearly, surprisingly, unfortunately or probably.
rules.zh: 在 It is 後面應使用形容詞，而不是副詞，例如 clear、surprising、unfortunate 和 likely。
examples: It is clear that the shop is closed.

rules.en: Keep the tense in the that-clause consistent with the original meaning: present, past, future or present perfect.
rules.zh: That 句中的時態要配合原本意思，例如現在式、過去式、將來式或現在完成式。
examples: It is clear that he understands the rule.
It is surprising that he finished so quickly.
It is likely that she will arrive early.
It is clear that the system has improved.

rules.en: This lesson uses ordinary complete clauses after important, necessary and essential. Should + base verb and the formal subjunctive are not the main answers here.
rules.zh: 本課在 important、necessary 和 essential 後面集中使用一般完整子句；should + 動詞原形和正式英語中的虛擬語氣不是主要答案。
examples: It is important that everyone follows the rules.

rules.en: Do not confuse this structure with It is + adjective + to + verb. A that-clause clearly identifies who acts or which situation is being evaluated.
rules.zh: 不要與 It is + adjective + to + verb 混淆。使用 that 句可以明確說出誰做這個行動，或哪一件事情受到評價。
examples: It is important to learn about history.
It is important that we learn about history.

benefits.zh: 把形容詞放在前面，讀者可以很快知道你認為一件事重要、清楚、意外、可能或令人擔心。

benefits.en: It combines an event and its evaluation in one sentence.
benefits.zh: 不用寫兩個分開的短句，也能清楚把「事情」和「評價」合併成一句。

benefits.en: It expresses degrees of possibility clearly.
benefits.zh: 可使用 possible、likely、unlikely 或 certain，準確表達一件事發生的機會。

benefits.en: It avoids repeatedly using I think.
benefits.zh: 省略 I think 可以把注意力放在事情本身，適合作文、報告、簡報和正式討論。

benefits.en: It helps you develop an explanation.
benefits.zh: 先使用這個句型提出判斷，然後加入原因、例子或結果，形成清楚的段落開頭。

sourceOmissions: The PDF presents the Communicative Function, Important Rules and Benefits explanations mainly in Chinese; their English versions are faithful editorial translations.

en: Rewrite each sentence using It is + adjective + that.
Preserve the original meaning, tense, positive or negative meaning, and all important information.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 It is + 形容詞 + that 改寫以下句子。
答案須保留原句的意思、時態、肯定或否定意思，以及所有重要資料。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: We should drink enough water every day. This is important.
questions.promptZh: 我們每天都應該喝足夠的水。這是很重要的。
questions.answer: It is important that we drink enough water every day.
questions.answerZh: 我們每天喝足夠的水是很重要的。
questions.highlight: It is important that we drink enough water every day.

questions.prompt: Mia clearly understands the instructions.
questions.promptZh: 米婭顯然明白這些指示。
questions.answer: It is clear that Mia understands the instructions.
questions.answerZh: 很明顯，米婭明白這些指示。
questions.highlight: It is clear that Mia understands the instructions.

questions.prompt: The children are playing outside, and this is a good thing.
questions.promptZh: 孩子們正在戶外玩耍，這是一件好事。
questions.answer: It is good that the children are playing outside.
questions.answerZh: 孩子們正在戶外玩耍是一件好事。
questions.highlight: It is good that the children are playing outside.

questions.prompt: Ben finished the race very quickly. This was surprising.
questions.promptZh: 本很快便完成賽事。這令人意外。
questions.answer: It is surprising that Ben finished the race very quickly.
questions.answerZh: 本很快便完成賽事是令人意外的。
questions.highlight: It is surprising that Ben finished the race very quickly.

questions.prompt: You must bring your identity card.
questions.promptZh: 你必須帶備身分證。
questions.answer: It is necessary that you bring your identity card.
questions.answerZh: 你帶備身分證是必要的。
questions.highlight: It is necessary that you bring your identity card.

questions.prompt: The shop may close early today.
questions.promptZh: 這間商店今天可能會提早關門。
questions.answer: It is possible that the shop will close early today.
questions.answerZh: 這間商店今天有可能提早關門。
questions.highlight: It is possible that the shop will close early today.

questions.prompt: Sarah will probably arrive before noon.
questions.promptZh: 莎拉很可能會在中午前到達。
questions.answer: It is likely that Sarah will arrive before noon.
questions.answerZh: 莎拉很可能會在中午前到達。
questions.highlight: It is likely that Sarah will arrive before noon.

questions.prompt: Unfortunately, our picnic was cancelled.
questions.promptZh: 很不幸，我們的野餐被取消了。
questions.answer: It is unfortunate that our picnic was cancelled.
questions.answerZh: 我們的野餐被取消是很不幸的。
questions.highlight: It is unfortunate that our picnic was cancelled.

questions.prompt: Obviously, this bag belongs to Leo.
questions.promptZh: 很明顯，這個袋屬於里奧。
questions.answer: It is obvious that this bag belongs to Leo.
questions.answerZh: 很明顯，這個袋屬於里奧。
questions.highlight: It is obvious that this bag belongs to Leo.

questions.prompt: The teacher gives us clear examples. This is helpful.
questions.promptZh: 老師給我們清楚的例子。這很有幫助。
questions.answer: It is helpful that the teacher gives us clear examples.
questions.answerZh: 老師給我們清楚的例子是很有幫助的。
questions.highlight: It is helpful that the teacher gives us clear examples.

questions.prompt: Everyone should follow the safety rules. This is important.

questions.answer: It is important that everyone follows the safety rules.
questions.answerZh: 每個人遵守安全規則是很重要的。
questions.highlight: It is important that everyone follows the safety rules.

questions.prompt: Strangely, the lights are still on.
questions.promptZh: 奇怪的是，燈仍然亮着。
questions.answer: It is strange that the lights are still on.
questions.answerZh: 燈仍然亮着是很奇怪的。
questions.highlight: It is strange that the lights are still on.

questions.prompt: More students are reading for pleasure. This is encouraging.

questions.answer: It is encouraging that more students are reading for pleasure.

questions.highlight: It is reassuring that the test results are normal.

questions.prompt: The river is becoming more polluted. This is worrying.
questions.promptZh: 河流污染日益嚴重。這令人擔憂。

questions.answerZh: 河流污染日益嚴重是令人擔憂的。
questions.highlight: It is worrying that the river is becoming more polluted.

questions.answer: It is understandable that Nina feels nervous before the interview.

questions.highlight: It is understandable that Nina feels nervous before the interview.

questions.prompt: The school needs to provide quiet study spaces. This is important.

questions.prompt: The missing parcel may have been sent to the wrong address.
questions.promptZh: 遺失的包裹可能被寄到錯誤的地址。

questions.answerZh: 遺失的包裹有可能被寄到錯誤的地址。

questions.prompt: Nobody noticed the broken window, which is surprising.
questions.promptZh: 沒有人注意到破裂的窗戶，這令人意外。
questions.answer: It is surprising that nobody noticed the broken window.
questions.answerZh: 沒有人注意到破裂的窗戶是令人意外的。
questions.highlight: It is surprising that nobody noticed the broken window.

questions.prompt: Fortunately, the driver saw the child in time.
questions.promptZh: 幸好，司機及時看見那名孩子。
questions.answer: It is fortunate that the driver saw the child in time.
questions.answerZh: 幸好司機及時看見了那名孩子。
questions.highlight: It is fortunate that the driver saw the child in time.

questions.prompt: The new system has clearly reduced waiting times.
questions.promptZh: 新系統顯然縮短了等候時間。
questions.answer: It is clear that the new system has reduced waiting times.
questions.answerZh: 很明顯，新系統已經縮短了等候時間。
questions.highlight: It is clear that the new system has reduced waiting times.

questions.prompt: There is some doubt about whether this old computer can run the programme.
questions.promptZh: 對於這部舊電腦能否運行這個程式，仍存在一些疑問。
questions.answer: It is doubtful that this old computer can run the programme.

questions.highlight: It is doubtful that this old computer can run the programme.

questions.prompt: Customers’ expectation of a full refund is understandable.
questions.promptZh: 顧客期望獲得全數退款是可以理解的。
questions.answer: It is understandable that customers expect a full refund.
questions.answerZh: 顧客期望獲得全數退款是可以理解的。
questions.highlight: It is understandable that customers expect a full refund.

questions.prompt: The meeting ended without a decision. This was disappointing.
questions.promptZh: 會議在未有作出決定的情況下結束。這令人失望。
questions.answer: It is disappointing that the meeting ended without a decision.
questions.answerZh: 會議在未有作出決定的情況下結束是令人失望的。
questions.highlight: It is disappointing that the meeting ended without a decision.

questions.prompt: There is a good chance that the museum will attract more visitors next year.
questions.promptZh: 博物館明年很有機會吸引更多訪客。

questions.prompt: Unfortunately, the storm delayed several flights.

questions.highlight: It is unfortunate that several flights were delayed by the storm.

questions.prompt: Clearly, the painting was damaged before it reached the gallery.
questions.promptZh: 很明顯，畫作在送抵畫廊前已經受損。
questions.answer: It is clear that the painting was damaged before it reached the gallery.
questions.answerZh: 很明顯，畫作在送抵畫廊前已經受損。
questions.highlight: It is clear that the painting was damaged before it reached the gallery.

questions.prompt: The payment may have been recorded twice.

questions.answer: It is possible that the payment was recorded twice.
questions.answerZh: 這筆款項有可能被重複記錄。
questions.highlight: It is possible that the payment was recorded twice.

questions.prompt: The fact that the machine still works after twenty years is surprising.
questions.promptZh: 這部機器使用了二十年後仍能運作，實在令人意外。
questions.answer: It is surprising that the machine still works after twenty years.
questions.answerZh: 這部機器使用了二十年後仍能運作，實在令人意外。
questions.highlight: It is surprising that the machine still works after twenty years.

questions.prompt: The council probably will not approve the plan in its current form.
questions.promptZh: 市議會很可能不會按目前的形式批准這項計劃。
questions.answer: It is unlikely that the council will approve the plan in its current form.
questions.answerZh: 市議會不大可能按目前的形式批准這項計劃。
questions.highlight: It is unlikely that the council will approve the plan in its current form.

questions.prompt: The offers of help from local residents are encouraging.

questions.highlight: It is encouraging that local residents have offered to help.

questions.prompt: Some employees are worried about the change, and their concern is understandable.
questions.promptZh: 一些僱員對這項改變感到擔心，而他們的憂慮是可以理解的。
questions.answer: It is understandable that some employees are worried about the change.

questions.highlight: It is understandable that some employees are worried about the change.

questions.prompt: Anyone can clearly see that the two reports describe the same incident.
questions.promptZh: 任何人都能清楚看出，兩份報告描述的是同一宗事件。
questions.answer: It is obvious that the two reports describe the same incident.
questions.answerZh: 很明顯，兩份報告描述的是同一宗事件。
questions.highlight: It is obvious that the two reports describe the same incident.

questions.prompt: Public services need to remain accessible to elderly residents. This is important.
questions.promptZh: 公共服務需要繼續方便年長居民使用。這很重要。

questions.answerZh: 公共服務繼續方便年長居民使用是很重要的。
questions.highlight: It is important that public services remain accessible to elderly residents.

questions.highlight: It is clear that the policy has affected small firms differently.
